prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its walls and floor showing clear signs of age and neglect. The walls are made of large, pale panels, many of which are cracked and peeling, revealing darker layers beneath. Rusty metal barriers line the right side of the walkway, their surfaces corroded and weathered. Small patches of green vegetation have taken root in the cracks of the concrete floor, which is also marked by stains and scattered debris. A red "EXIT" sign glows faintly at the far end of the passage, its light casting a soft glow on the surrounding surfaces. The ceiling is lined with rows of fluorescent lights, some of which appear dim or broken, contributing to the overall sense of abandonment. The perspective slowly moves forward, revealing more of the corridor's length and the repeating pattern of barriers and decay.
